task_completion.description: Verify that all tracked changes in the document have been accepted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text should appear clean without any revision markup (no red text, strikethroughs, or underlines). The phrases 'non-exclusive and sublicensable' and 'thirty (30) days' should be visible as normal text in the document body. Alternatively, the 'Accept All Changes' action being clicked in the Review ribbon.

task_completion.description: Verify the insertion of the first footnote containing a patent-law citation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A superscript '1' in the document body and a corresponding footnote area at the bottom of the page containing a legal citation related to patent law (e.g., referencing 35 U.S.C., a patent case, or patent regulations).

task_completion.description: Verify the insertion of a second footnote containing a patent-law citation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A superscript '2' in the document body and a corresponding footnote area at the bottom of the page containing another legal citation related to patent law.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved to the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the directory path 'Desktop\WordTasks', or a File Explorer window showing the saved file inside the 'WordTasks' folder on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename 'patent_license_final.docx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'patent_license_final.docx' visible in the 'Save As' dialog box, the Microsoft Word application title bar at the top of the screen, or in the File Explorer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Microsoft Word GUI to perform the edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Microsoft Word interface (e.g., clicking the Review tab, References tab, or Save As menu) rather than using a terminal, Python script, or command-line tool to modify the docx file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Word's built-in footnote feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The footnotes should be in the dedicated footnote section at the bottom of the page, separated by a short horizontal line, likely accessed via the 'References -> Insert Footnote' button, rather than just manually typing superscript numbers and footer text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the editing process by simply moving or downloading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a progression of screenshots showing the document being actively edited (changes accepted, footnotes typed) before being saved as the final file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves finalizing a synthetic patent license agreement between BioSynthetics Corporation and MedTech Innovations LLC. The agent acts as a paralegal (O*NET 23-2011.00) at Morrison & Foerster LLP (a real law firm). The original document contains tracked changes from J. Morrison and R. Chen. Accepting these changes should reveal the phrases 'non-exclusive and sublicensable' and 'thirty (30) days'. The document initially has no footnotes; the agent must insert at least two containing patent-law citations. The final file must be saved as 'patent_license_final.docx' in Desktop\WordTasks.
